meta.name: bible-genesis-1-sample
meta.description: Sample Bible corpus: Genesis chapter 1, verses 1–20 (KJV).

chapters.title: Genesis 1
chapters.summary: The creation of heaven and earth.

verses.sanskritText: In the beginning God created the heaven and the earth.

translations.text: In the beginning God created the heaven and the earth.

verses.sanskritText: And the earth was without form, and void; and darkness was upon the face of the deep. And the Spirit of God moved upon the face of the waters.

translations.text: And the earth was without form, and void; and darkness was upon the face of the deep. And the Spirit of God moved upon the face of the waters.

verses.sanskritText: And God said, Let there be light: and there was light.

translations.text: And God said, Let there be light: and there was light.

verses.sanskritText: And God saw the light, that it was good: and God divided the light from the darkness.

translations.text: And God saw the light, that it was good: and God divided the light from the darkness.

verses.sanskritText: And God called the light Day, and the darkness he called Night. And the evening and the morning were the first day.

translations.text: And God called the light Day, and the darkness he called Night. And the evening and the morning were the first day.

verses.sanskritText: And God said, Let there be a firmament in the midst of the waters, and let it divide the waters from the waters.

translations.text: And God said, Let there be a firmament in the midst of the waters, and let it divide the waters from the waters.

verses.sanskritText: And God made the firmament, and divided the waters which were under the firmament from the waters which were above the firmament: and it was so.

translations.text: And God made the firmament, and divided the waters which were under the firmament from the waters which were above the firmament: and it was so.

verses.sanskritText: And God called the firmament Heaven. And the evening and the morning were the second day.

translations.text: And God called the firmament Heaven. And the evening and the morning were the second day.

verses.sanskritText: And God said, Let the waters under the heaven be gathered together unto one place, and let the dry land appear: and it was so.

translations.text: And God said, Let the waters under the heaven be gathered together unto one place, and let the dry land appear: and it was so.

verses.sanskritText: And God called the dry land Earth; and the gathering together of the waters called he Seas: and God saw that it was good.

translations.text: And God called the dry land Earth; and the gathering together of the waters called he Seas: and God saw that it was good.

verses.sanskritText: And God said, Let the earth bring forth grass, the herb yielding seed, and the fruit tree yielding fruit after his kind, whose seed is in itself, upon the earth: and it was so.

translations.text: And God said, Let the earth bring forth grass, the herb yielding seed, and the fruit tree yielding fruit after his kind, whose seed is in itself, upon the earth: and it was so.

verses.sanskritText: And the earth brought forth grass, and herb yielding seed after his kind, and the tree yielding fruit, whose seed was in itself, after his kind: and God saw that it was good.

translations.text: And the earth brought forth grass, and herb yielding seed after his kind, and the tree yielding fruit, whose seed was in itself, after his kind: and God saw that it was good.

verses.sanskritText: And the evening and the morning were the third day.

translations.text: And the evening and the morning were the third day.

verses.sanskritText: And God said, Let there be lights in the firmament of the heaven to divide the day from the night; and let them be for signs, and for seasons, and for days, and years:

translations.text: And God said, Let there be lights in the firmament of the heaven to divide the day from the night; and let them be for signs, and for seasons, and for days, and years:

verses.sanskritText: And let them be for lights in the firmament of the heaven to give light upon the earth: and it was so.

translations.text: And let them be for lights in the firmament of the heaven to give light upon the earth: and it was so.

verses.sanskritText: And God made two great lights; the greater light to rule the day, and the lesser light to rule the night: he made the stars also.

translations.text: And God made two great lights; the greater light to rule the day, and the lesser light to rule the night: he made the stars also.

verses.sanskritText: And God set them in the firmament of the heaven to give light upon the earth,

translations.text: And God set them in the firmament of the heaven to give light upon the earth,

verses.sanskritText: And to rule over the day and over the night, and to divide the light from the darkness: and God saw that it was good.

translations.text: And to rule over the day and over the night, and to divide the light from the darkness: and God saw that it was good.

verses.sanskritText: And the evening and the morning were the fourth day.

translations.text: And the evening and the morning were the fourth day.

verses.sanskritText: And God said, Let the waters bring forth abundantly the moving creature that hath life, and fowl that may fly above the earth in the open firmament of heaven.

translations.text: And God said, Let the waters bring forth abundantly the moving creature that hath life, and fowl that may fly above the earth in the open firmament of heaven.
